name: Rapidmon Armor

signature_move.name: Rapid Fire
signature_move.description: Rapid-fires homing missiles from its arms and the revolver on its back.

description: A Holy Knight Digimon that Armor Evolved from Terriermon with the " Digimental of Fate ". Rapidmon is normally a Perfect which evolves from Galgomon , but thanks to the "Digimental of Fate", it is able to shine gold and sublimate power up to the Ultimate Level. Its Special Moves are rapid-firing homing missiles from both of its arms and the revolver equipped to its back ( Rapid Fire ), and " Golden Triangle ", which is similar in power level to Magnamon 's Special Move, " Extreme Jihad ".
